    A

    AccountController - Class in com.daraxtlar.quantummail.controller
    REST controller responsible for user account management operations.
    AccountController(UserService) - Constructor for class com.daraxtlar.quantummail.controller.AccountController
    Creates a new account controller.
    accountEmail - Variable in class com.daraxtlar.quantummail.entity.ImapMail
    Email account from which the message was synchronized.
    accountEmail - Variable in class com.daraxtlar.quantummail.model.MoveMailRequest
    Email account containing the message.
    activeSyncs - Variable in class com.daraxtlar.quantummail.service.MailService
    Collection of currently active mailbox synchronizations used to prevent concurrent synchronization of the same folder.
    addAccount(Long, EmailAddressDTO) - Method in class com.daraxtlar.quantummail.service.EmailAddressService
    Adds a new email account for a user.
    addEmailAccount(String, EmailAddressDTO) - Method in class com.daraxtlar.quantummail.controller.EmailAddressController
    Adds a new email account for the authenticated user.
    addSuggestedRecipient(Long, String, String) - Method in class com.daraxtlar.quantummail.service.MailService
    Adds or updates a recipient suggestion entry.
    addSuggestion(String, Map) - Method in class com.daraxtlar.quantummail.controller.MailController
    Adds a recipient suggestion for future email composition.

    ApiController - Class in com.daraxtlar.quantummail.controller
    REST controller responsible for authentication and user registration.

    Creates a new authentication controller.

    Represents metadata describing an email attachment.

    AuthResponse - Class in com.daraxtlar.quantummail.model
    Response object returned after authentication-related operations.
    AuthResponse(String, boolean) - Constructor for class com.daraxtlar.quantummail.model.AuthResponse
    Creates a basic authentication response without user information.
    AuthResponse(String, boolean, String) - Constructor for class com.daraxtlar.quantummail.model.AuthResponse
    Creates an authentication response containing user information but without a JWT token.
    AuthResponse(String, boolean, String, String) - Constructor for class com.daraxtlar.quantummail.model.AuthResponse
    Creates a complete authentication response.

    changePassword(PasswordChangeRequest, Principal) - Method in class com.daraxtlar.quantummail.controller.AccountController
    Changes the password of the currently authenticated user.

    Changes the password of an existing user account.

    Removes HTML tags and returns plain text content.

    Safely closes a resource without propagating exceptions.

    Counts messages stored within a specific mailbox folder.

    decrypt(String) - Method in class com.daraxtlar.quantummail.service.EmailCryptoService
    Decrypts a previously encrypted email password.

    Deletes the account of the currently authenticated user.

    Deletes an email account belonging to a user.

    Permanently deletes a user account.

    Request object used for account deletion operations.

    Removes a saved recipient suggestion.

    Removes a stored recipient suggestion.

    Detects standard mailbox folders available on the remote mail server.

    Processes each incoming request and attempts to authenticate the user based on the provided JWT token.

    Downloads an attachment from an email message.

    F

    fetchEmails(String, String, String, int, int, String) - Method in class com.daraxtlar.quantummail.controller.MailController
    Retrieves emails from a selected mailbox folder.
    fileName - Variable in class com.daraxtlar.quantummail.model.Attachment
    Attachment filename.
    findByAccountEmailAndFolderNameAndUid(String, String, String) - Method in interface com.daraxtlar.quantummail.repository.ImapMailRepository
    Finds a message using its mailbox identifiers.
    findByAccountEmailAndFolderNameOrderBySentDateDescIdDesc(String, String, Pageable) - Method in interface com.daraxtlar.quantummail.repository.ImapMailRepository
    Retrieves messages from a folder ordered by sending date.
    findByAccountEmailAndIsStarredTrueOrderBySentDateDescIdDesc(String, Pageable) - Method in interface com.daraxtlar.quantummail.repository.ImapMailRepository
    Retrieves starred messages for a given account.
    findByEmailAddressAndUserId(String, Long) - Method in interface com.daraxtlar.quantummail.repository.EmailAddressRepository
    Finds a specific email account owned by a user.
    findBySenderEmailAndRecipientEmailAndUserId(String, String, Long) - Method in interface com.daraxtlar.quantummail.repository.MailRepository
    Finds a sender-recipient relationship for a specific user.
    findByUserId(Long) - Method in interface com.daraxtlar.quantummail.repository.EmailAddressRepository
    Retrieves all email accounts belonging to a user.
    findByUsername(String) - Method in interface com.daraxtlar.quantummail.repository.UserRepository
    Finds a user by username.
    findFirstByAccountEmailAndSenderAndSubjectAndSentDate(String, String, String, Date) - Method in interface com.daraxtlar.quantummail.repository.ImapMailRepository
    Finds a message using its basic metadata.
    findPartDataRecursive(Part, String) - Method in class com.daraxtlar.quantummail.service.MailService
    Recursively searches a MIME structure for an attachment or embedded resource and returns its binary data.
    findRecentRecipientsByAccount(Long, Pageable) - Method in interface com.daraxtlar.quantummail.repository.MailRepository
    Retrieves the most recently used recipients across all user accounts.
    findRecentRecipientsByEmail(Long, String, Pageable) - Method in interface com.daraxtlar.quantummail.repository.MailRepository
    Retrieves the most recently used recipients for a given sender address.

    Mailbox folder containing the message.

    Sender email address.

    Generates a JWT token for an authenticated user.

    Retrieves all email accounts belonging to a user.

    Collects metadata for all non-inline attachments contained in a message.

    Establishes or reuses an IMAP connection for the specified email account.

    Retrieves all email accounts associated with the authenticated user.
    getEmailDetails(String, String, String, long) - Method in class com.daraxtlar.quantummail.controller.MailController
    Retrieves detailed information about a specific email message.
    getEmailMessage(Long, String, String, long) - Method in class com.daraxtlar.quantummail.service.MailService
    Retrieves full details of an email message from the IMAP server.
    getEmailsFromDb(Long, String, String, String, int, int) - Method in class com.daraxtlar.quantummail.service.MailService
    Retrieves paginated email metadata from the local database.
    getFullContent(Part) - Method in class com.daraxtlar.quantummail.service.MailService
    Extracts the complete content of an email message.
    getGlobalSuggestedRecipients(Long) - Method in class com.daraxtlar.quantummail.service.MailService
    Retrieves recently used recipients across all user email accounts.
    getGlobalSuggestions(String) - Method in class com.daraxtlar.quantummail.controller.MailController
    Retrieves all recipient suggestions available to the authenticated user.
    getRealFolderName(Store, String) - Method in class com.daraxtlar.quantummail.service.MailService
    Resolves a logical folder name to the actual folder name used by the remote mail server.
    getSigningKey() - Method in class com.daraxtlar.quantummail.service.JwtService
    Creates the cryptographic signing key used for JWT operations.
    getSuggestedRecipients(Long, String) - Method in class com.daraxtlar.quantummail.service.MailService
    Retrieves recently used recipients for a specific sender account.
    getSuggestions(String, String) - Method in class com.daraxtlar.quantummail.controller.MailController
    Retrieves recipient suggestions associated with a specific sender address.
    getUserEmailAccounts(Long) - Method in class com.daraxtlar.quantummail.service.MailService
    Retrieves all email accounts associated with a user.
    getUserEmailAccounts(String) - Method in class com.daraxtlar.quantummail.controller.MailController
    Retrieves all email accounts configured by the authenticated user.
    getUserIdFromHeader(String) - Method in class com.daraxtlar.quantummail.controller.MailController
    Extracts the authenticated user's identifier from a JWT authorization header.
    getUserIdFromToken(String) - Method in class com.daraxtlar.quantummail.service.JwtService
    Extracts the user identifier stored in a JWT token.
    getUsernameFromToken(String) - Method in class com.daraxtlar.quantummail.service.JwtService
    Extracts the username stored in a JWT token.

    success - Variable in class com.daraxtlar.quantummail.model.AuthResponse
    Indicates whether the operation completed successfully.
    syncEmails(String, String, String) - Method in class com.daraxtlar.quantummail.controller.MailController
    Synchronizes a mailbox folder with the remote IMAP server.
    syncFolderFromImap(Long, String, String) - Method in class com.daraxtlar.quantummail.service.MailService
    Synchronizes a mailbox folder with the remote IMAP server.
    syncNonGmailStarred(Store, String) - Method in class com.daraxtlar.quantummail.service.MailService
    Synchronizes starred messages for non-Gmail accounts.

    T

    targetFolderName - Variable in class com.daraxtlar.quantummail.model.MoveMailRequest
    Destination folder to which the message should be moved.
    threadLocalFolderMap - Variable in class com.daraxtlar.quantummail.service.MailService
    Thread-local cache containing detected folder mappings for the currently connected mailbox.
    threadLocalStore - Variable in class com.daraxtlar.quantummail.service.MailService
    Thread-local IMAP store connection used during mailbox operations.
    to - Variable in class com.daraxtlar.quantummail.model.EmailMessage
    Recipient email address.
    token - Variable in class com.daraxtlar.quantummail.model.AuthResponse
    JWT token generated during authentication.

    U

    uid - Variable in class com.daraxtlar.quantummail.entity.ImapMail
    Unique message identifier assigned by the mail server.
    uid - Variable in class com.daraxtlar.quantummail.model.MoveMailRequest
    Unique identifier of the email message.
    user - Variable in class com.daraxtlar.quantummail.entity.Mail
    User associated with the suggestion.
    User - Class in com.daraxtlar.quantummail.entity
    Entity representing an application user.
    User() - Constructor for class com.daraxtlar.quantummail.entity.User
     
    userId - Variable in class com.daraxtlar.quantummail.entity.EmailAddress
    Identifier of the user who owns the email account.
    username - Variable in class com.daraxtlar.quantummail.entity.User
    Unique username used for authentication.
    username - Variable in class com.daraxtlar.quantummail.model.AuthResponse
    Authenticated user's username.
    username - Variable in class com.daraxtlar.quantummail.model.LoginRequest
    Username used for authentication.
    username - Variable in class com.daraxtlar.quantummail.model.RegisterRequest
    Desired username.

    userRepository - Variable in class com.daraxtlar.quantummail.service.SendEmailService
    Repository providing access to application users.
    userRepository - Variable in class com.daraxtlar.quantummail.service.UserService

    Repository responsible for persistence operations related to User entities.

    Service responsible for user account management and authentication.
